description: Detects unused private methods, unused imports, and unreachable code in C#. Simplified from Rust: flags all using_directive nodes. Cannot detect unused private methods (requires identifier occurrence counting) or unreachable code after return/break/throw (requires block-level CFG). Only using directive structural detection.

flag.message: using directive detected -- verify this import is actually used in the file. Remove unused using directives to reduce coupling.
